name: Match the Leader
challenge: Finish the hole with the same or better real score than the current leader.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Finish the hole with the same or better real score than the current leader. Reward: +2.

name: Spoiler Alert
challenge: Beat at least one player who is ahead of you in game points on this hole's real score.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Beat at least one player who is ahead of you in game points on this hole's real score. Reward: +2.

name: Chase Mode
challenge: If the player before you completes their mission, complete yours too.
rulesText: Manual mission check. If the player before you completes their mission, complete yours too. Reward: +2.

name: Best in the Group
challenge: Record the best real score on the hole outright.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Record the best real score on the hole outright. Reward: +3.

name: Survivor
challenge: If at least one player makes double bogey or worse, make bogey or better.
rulesText: Manual mission check. If at least one player makes double bogey or worse, make bogey or better. Reward: +2.

name: Pressure Pairing
challenge: Finish no more than one stroke worse than the best score in the group.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Finish no more than one stroke worse than the best score in the group. Reward: +2.

name: Outplay the Bombers
challenge: Have a shorter drive than someone else in the group but still tie or beat them on the hole.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Have a shorter drive than someone else in the group but still tie or beat them on the hole. Reward: +3.

name: Closer's Bonus
challenge: If you are the last to hole out, still make bogey or better.
rulesText: Manual mission check. If you are the last to hole out, still make bogey or better. Reward: +2.

name: Turn the Tables
challenge: After losing to at least one player on the previous hole, beat them here.
rulesText: Manual mission check. After losing to at least one player on the previous hole, beat them here. Reward: +3.

name: Shadow Game
challenge: Match your own mission and also beat your previous hole's real score.
rulesText: Manual mission check. Match your own mission and also beat your previous hole's real score. Reward: +3.
